description: Realistic invoice: heading, meta lines, and a styled line-item table with a totals row.
visual_assertions: A large 'Invoice #2026-0042' heading with muted date and bill-to lines above the table.
A blue table header; three line items; a bold 'Total due $7,920' row.
A 'Thank you for your business.' line below the table, clear of its bottom edge.
